Package com.koralix.commons.value

Interface Value<T>

Type Parameters:
T - the value type
All Known Implementing Classes:
AtomicWrapperValue, WrapperValue
public interface Value<T>
A Value is the core of the value system, which provides a way to observe and change values. It represents a value that can be observed and changed.
See Also:
  • ValueGroup

    Interface
    Description
    static interface 
    Value.Listener<T>
    A listener for value changes.
